creator: oliver.pntr@gmail.com
text:
Fix: 

This patches required, when set clang as default compiler on FreeBSD:

patch-kmrml_kmrml_mrml__elements.h
patch-ksvg_impl_libs_libtext2path_src_Converter.cpp
patch-kviewshell_documentWidget.cpp
patch-kviewshell_plugins_djvu_libdjvu_GContainer.h

from: http://ftp.fr.netbsd.org/pub/NetBSD/NetBSD-current/pkgsrc/graphics/kdegraphics3/patches/

add the attached patches to kdegraphics3/file dir
How-To-Repeat: src.conf:

WITH_CLANG=
WITH_CLANG_IS_CC=

cd /usr/ports/graphics/kdegraphics3
make install
